name: zscan
description: Local security scanner for JS/Python repos: dependency vulns (OSV), reports for AI-assisted fixes

scripts.scan:self: npm run build && node dist/cli.js scan --root .
scripts.scan:self:save: npm run build && node dist/cli.js scan-all --root .
scripts.scan:all: npm run build && node dist/cli.js scan-all --root .
scripts.scan:example: npm run build && node dist/cli.js scan --root examples/test-app
scripts.scan:test-py: npm run build && node dist/cli.js scan --root examples/test-py
scripts.scan:test-yarn: npm run build && node dist/cli.js scan --root examples/test-yarn
scripts.scan:test-pnpm: npm run build && node dist/cli.js scan --root examples/test-pnpm
scripts.llm-probe: npm run build && node dist/cli.js llm-probe --root .
scripts.serve: npm run build && node dist/cli.js serve
scripts.test:integration:ollama: npm run ollama:ensure && ZSCAN_INTEGRATION_OLLAMA=1 npm run test:integration
